HarmonizedDataset.description: A harmonized dataset: an ordered collection of ``HarmonizedRecord`` rows conforming to the target schema.

records.description: The harmonized rows that make up the dataset.

HarmonizedDataset.title: HarmonizedDataset

HarmonizedRecord.description: A single row of a harmonized soil moisture dataset. The ordered list of slots corresponds exactly to ``HARMONIZED_COLUMNS`` (order matters). ``datetime_UTC`` and ``site_id`` are required, and at least one of the three moisture variables must be present.

datetime_UTC.description: Observation timestamp in UTC. Maps to a pandas ``datetime64[ns, UTC]`` column. Required.

depth_m.description: Sampling depth below the surface, in meters.

gravimetric_water_content_gH2O_gs.description: Gravimetric water content (grams of water per gram of dry soil). The generous upper bound accommodates organic-rich soils.

interval_min.description: Sampling interval in minutes for time-series records. Stored as a float to allow NaN (missing) values. Nullable.

is_timeseries.description: Whether the record belongs to a time series (true) or is a one-off / point measurement (false).

replicate.description: Replicate number for the observation. Stored as a float to allow NaN (missing) values. Nullable.

site_id.description: Identifier for the sampling site. Required.

volumetric_water_content_m3_m3.description: Volumetric water content as a fraction (cubic meters of water per cubic meter of soil).

water_potential_kPa.description: Soil water potential in kilopascals. Values are non-positive (zero at saturation, increasingly negative as the soil dries).

HarmonizedRecord.title: HarmonizedRecord

QCFlagVocabulary.description: Controlled vocabulary for QC flag values. Equivalent to the ``QCFlagVocabulary`` enum in ``target_schema.py``.
QCFlagVocabulary.title: QCFlagVocabulary
